products.name: Citrus
products.story: The lightest taste in the range. I used yuzu peel and a small amount of cane sugar for the flavour, which is why the colour scheme for this can is primarily yellow with orange striping. It is meant to be a tart flavour instead of a sugary flavour.

products.name: Berry
products.story: Blackberry and elderflower. The directions for this can were simply that the can was to be coloured purple because I wanted a cool colour and thought it would contrast nicely with Citrus. Elderflower was added in the story to ensure it didn't sound too fruity. This will be the best-selling flavour in the simulated NovaSoda world.

products.name: Nova Cola
products.flavour: Cola with a hint of vanilla
products.story: Nova Cola is the flagship item and represents the most complex item produced in this project. I put it in a glass bottle rather than a can because the carbonation lasts longer, and the glass also let me write a custom GLSL shader for the transparent glass using a dual mesh object model to define the bottle and the liquid. You can switch to wireframe mode to see the bottle and liquid are in fact two separate three-dimensional meshes sitting inside each other.
